DESTINATION - Combined Freetime (Detention) Exception (CTIC) - excluding Storage
all other as per ONE tariff
* Unless otherwise specified, duration of Freetime exception will be effective date of amendment until expiration of contract (including extensions)
* For Dual Type Exceptions you must provide charge amount, for all size types, to be charged after expiration of Freetime
* Free time calculation is based on movement date
Vessel Discharge (VD) to Inbound Full Delivery (ID)
Inbound Full Delivery (ID) to Empty Return (MT)

Rates are GIAI inclusive of surcharges mentioned in column Q on "IEA-DRY" tab.
Rates are subject to following surcharges:
subject to - as per ONE tariff
subject to - as per ONE tariff
subject to - as per ONE tariff

Rates are also subject to EMERGENCY FUEL SURCHARGE (EFS),  Documentation Fee (DOC/DOF) , Hazardous surcharge (HAZ), Peak Season Surcharge (PSS), local surcharges at origin/destination 
and all other surcharges mentioned in the applicable ONE tariff
** NCMP - North West continent mainports -  Rotterdam, Southampton, Hamburg, Le Havre, Antwerp (under the condition that mothervessel calls directly at said port)
** Amounts are in Euro (EUR) unless otherwise mentioned.
** Transshipment ports are subject to changes.
** BL Rating date (basis for ocean freight and surcharge invoicing) will be based on “Proforma ETD” of first vessel at the time of booking
** Free Out Terms - Free Out Charges are paid locally at destination by the receiver and should not be paid elsewhere.
